publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Movie Film, Photographs, Printed Materials, Publications
did.abstract: Includes records, film, video and computer files documenting the history of the laboratory and its programs.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Shoals Marine Laboratory (SML) is dedicated to undergraduate research and education in marine science. Founded in 1966, the program has offered students the unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience in the field for nearly 50 years.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes records, film, video and computer files documenting the history of the laboratory and its programs. The collection houses a variety of documents, some from before SML's founding. This includes newsletters (from 1967-2003), reports on the program, the SML charter, finances, surveys, logs, various publications, correspondences, photographs, boat and house information and contracts, equipment information, and a number of other historical and miscellaneous documents. There are also a number of videos mostly in the form of either VHS or film reel. Some of these are SML oriented, focusing on history or the island, while others are marine biology related, educational videos about whales or other oceanic beings. Also correspondence, including some from John Kingsbury regarding trying to get the lab started and the funding, research, and operations of the lab. Logs of the Research Vessel Wrack and correspondence about how it was acquired.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Shoals Marine Laboratory records, #21-48-3866. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Cornell Summer Program in Marine Biology
Rel. to Div. of Bio. Science

Marine Field Stations With Educational Programs Survey
"Report on Establishment of a Cornell Marine Station"
Books on I.O.S., Appledore, and SML
Budgets, Fiscal Reports and Analyses (Bound folder)

Financial and donor correspondence, brochures, newsletters, and reports
Blueprints, correspondence, administrative papers, and course materials
Administrative files, log books, Wrack information
Prints by Kenn and Susan Marash
Neil D. Troost, with photographs and correspondence
Adapts PK, Seatable Aquarium, Hertz, Neuro
"The Isles of Shoals - A Profile" Magnetic Tape Video
"History of the Isle of Shoals Marine Lab Film"
"In Search of the Bowhead Whale - Reel I"
"In Search of the Bowhead Whale - Reel II"
"SML and Activities, Algae - Isle of Shoals"
"The Humpback Whale: Summer - A Time For Feeding"
"The Humpback Whale: Winter - A Time For Singing"
"The Undersea World of Jacques Cousteau: Whales"
"Dept. of History of Art - Corbusier: Designs for Harvard - Lease Print"
Right Whales and the Prudent Mariner (16 minute VHS English Version)
Imagine Yourself at UNH: A Community of Learners
Shoals Marine Laboratory: Celebrating 25 Years of Excellence in Marine Education
